reagents.grade_purity: gadolinium tris(2,2,6,6-tetramethyl-3,5-heptanedionate) — partial Y substitution for in-field Jc improvement (SuperPower SCS/SF series)
50 μm cold-rolled Ni-Cr-Mo alloy tape, ~4-12 mm wide, mechanically polished + electropolished surface
ion-beam-assisted deposition biaxially-textured MgO, ~10 nm, on Y2O3+Al2O3 amorphous bed
sputtered CeO2 cap layer, ~30-100 nm, lattice-matched to REBCO basal plane
DC-sputtered silver, ~1-2 μm, post-REBCO O2-anneal interface
electroplated copper, ~20-40 μm surround, quench-protection stabilizer

conditions.atmosphere_gas: O2 partial pressure in N2/Ar carrier (typical pO2 ~ 1-5 Torr in reactor)

provenance.source_citation: SuperPower Inc. (Furukawa group) — 2G HTS Wire Specifications datasheet (public). MOCVD process documented in: Selvamanickam, V. et al. 'Recent progress in second-generation HTS conductor scale-up at SuperPower.' IEEE Trans. Appl. Supercond. 19, 3225 (2009). Multi-vendor variants documented in HTS Modelling Workgroup (htsmodelling.com) and EUCAS / ASC conference proceedings.

scope_caveats: Vendor-spec recipe — process parameters (deposition T≈800°C, O2 pp, ~1 μm REBCO thickness) reflect publicly documented SuperPower 2G HTS tape line; actual proprietary tuning per vendor (AMSC, Bruker, Fujikura, SuperOx) differs in buffer stack, precursor delivery (liquid injection vs bubbler), and tape geometry.
Duration of 7000 h is a representative coil-length-batch figure (multi-km tape run); single-pass reactor residence per tape segment is minutes — this number is throughput-amortised, not per-segment.

Reagent mol_ratios reflect the cation stoichiometry target (Y+Gd : Ba : Cu ≈ 1.5 : 2 : 3) in the deposited film. Substrate / buffer / overlay rows carry mol_ratio=0.0 because they are not part of the REBCO molar balance — they are geometric layers (the schema lacks a layer-thickness field; recorded here in grade_purity prose).

absorbed=false: replicated_by_independent_labs ≥ 5 (industry mature since ~2005) but RTSC.md §8.7 Tier 2 ingest is recipe + citation only. Tier 3 measurement (per-batch Jc(B,T,θ) typed table) and Tier 4 falsifier dispatch within demiurge remain ✗ until vendor datasheet CSV is cross-validated against a measurement record.

Vendor-spec ≠ lot-tested: production lots vary in Jc(B,T,θ) and in-field n-value; SuperPower SCS vs SF vs AP series differ in Gd doping and BaZrO3 artificial pinning addition — this stub captures the canonical (Y,Gd)Ba2Cu3O7-δ MOCVD route only.
citations: SuperPower Inc. 2G HTS Wire Specifications (public datasheet, superpower-inc.com)
Selvamanickam, V. et al. IEEE Trans. Appl. Supercond. 19, 3225 (2009)
